rationale: Section 11.27 governs solar and wind-powered energy device exemptions and is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in §11.13(b). No overlap or conflict exists between these provisions.
quote: A person is entitled to an exemption from taxation of the amount of appraised value of real property owned by the person that arises from the installation or construction on the property of a solar or wind-powered energy device
_note: Rule text (§11.27) addresses a distinct exemption category with no operative connection to the proposed §11.13(b) homestead exemption increase.
